case_title: JORGE BENUTTO VS. UNITED MEAT COMPANY, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENUTTO, JORGE AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED MEAT COMPANY, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENUTTO, JORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED MEAT COMPANY, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $42,164.25 PRINCIPAL, $41.72 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $42,615.97, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
